HOME.TITLE: SSSPOS: Support Links
HOME.SUPPORT_DESC: Are you having trouble configuring your local network or using SSSPOS? Our team is ready to help you resolve any technical questions.
HOME.PRIVACY_DESC: Learn how we manage your data and our commitment to the security of your information within SSSPOS.

PRIVACY.WELCOME: Welcome to SSSPOS. We believe that your business data belongs to you. Our architecture is designed to provide absolute autonomy without the need for internet contracts or expensive data plans.
PRIVACY.SEC1_DESC: SSSPOS transforms your router into a private network. Because we operate 100% offline, your sales information, product lists, and customer interactions never leave your establishment.
PRIVACY.SEC2_DESC: We do not collect, sell, or trade your business data. All intelligence—including sales charts and business insights—is processed and stored locally on your Server device.
PRIVACY.SEC3_DESC: Communication occurs strictly within your Local WiFi. This data is volatile and remains within your secure local environment.
PRIVACY.SEC4_DESC: The Free version allows up to 15 orders per day. This limit is managed locally and does not involve monitoring from our end.
PRIVACY.SEC5_DESC: By using SSSPOS, you maintain total control. If you uninstall the app, all information is permanently removed from the device.
PRIVACY.SEC6_DESC: For any questions regarding your privacy, please contact our support team through the official channels listed on our home page.
PRIVACY.FOOTER_NOTE: Empowering your business with privacy and freedom.
